name: Revise Active eBay Listings
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "When changes are made to your product, such as titles, descriptions, stock adjustments or changes in listing rules templates, you will need to revise your eBay listing."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "By default, revisions occur daily to update any changes you've made throughout the day. This behaviour can be changed in your eBay settings in Neto. There are three ways to force a manual revision of listings."}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1082-revise-active-ebay-listings#2", "children": [{"text": "Revise an Individual Listing"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1082-revise-active-ebay-listings#3", "children": [{"text": "Revise Listings in Bulk"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1082-revise-active-ebay-listings#4", "children": [{"text": "Revise all Listings on a Rules Template"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", Revisions"}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Revise an Individual Listing"}], "data-id": "1"}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel select "}, {"text": "Products", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "View Products", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click on the SKU you wish to edit."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Scroll to down to the "}, {"text": "List to eBay", "bold": true}, {"text": " section."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Revise", "bold": true}, {"text": " button.."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/ReviseActiveeBayListings1.05T5g00000v4pLYEAY.png", "2"}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel select "}, {"text": "eBay", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Active Listings", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select the listings you wish to revise."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Scroll down to "}, {"text": "Bulk Actions", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/ReviseActiveeBayListings2.05T5g00000v4rxSEAQ.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/ReviseActiveeBayListings2.05T5g00000v4rxSEAQ.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image2", "width": 700, "height": 247}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Revise Selected on eBay", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Revise all Listings on a Rules Template"}], "data-id": "3"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Listings can be revised in bulk per rules template. This is useful if you've made a change to the rules template and need the changes reflected on eBay."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "eBay", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Listing Rule Templates", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the checkbox next to the name of your rules template."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "At the bottom of the page, click the button that says "}, {"text": "Bulk Revise All Listings Assigned To Selected Template", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This will start a batch process to revise all listings on the selected template. You don't need to do anything further, as the processes will run automatically."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Set up Automatic Revisions"}], "data-id": "4"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To set up Neto to revise your listings automatically:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "eBay", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Setup & Tools", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click on "}, {"text": "Settings", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select when listings should revise in the "}, {"text": "Revise All eBay Listings On This Day", "bold": true}, {"text": " drop down box, and "}, {"text": "Save Changes", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/ReviseActiveeBayListings3.05T5g00000v4s1KEAQ.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/ReviseActiveeBayListings3.05T5g00000v4s1KEAQ.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image3", "width": 700, "height": 247}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Neto will now schedule full revisions for listings applied to eBay Listing Rules templates on the selected day(s)."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Revise all listings on a rules template"}], "data-id": "3"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Tips"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ":"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "eBay revisions will quite often push through a lot of information from Neto including data such as images, descriptions, and designs, so the run time can vary."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "It is not recommended to set the revisions to every day if you have 5000 or more products, as the process queue can begin to form a backlog. Before changing any settings it is best to regularly check your "}, {"text": "Pending", "bold": true}, {"text": " and "}, {"text": "Running", "bold": true}, {"text": " process queues to monitor whether or not you have any backlogging tasks (these can be found in "}, {"text": "eBay", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Pending / Running", "bold": true}, {"text": ")."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "If you aren't updating product data besides stock levels, it is best to set up automated revisions to once a week, and manually revise products when major changes are made."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
